rows.subject: Union Collective Project – Request for Budgetary Proposal
rows.body:
Subject: Union Collective Project – Request for Budgetary Proposal
Date: 2026-06-24T19:54:53Z
From: Patrick Antone <pantone@alleatogroup.com>
To: Weekley, Aaron <weekleya@lithko.com>

​ Union-Collective_Arch_60% CD 2026-06-05 7.pdf ​ ​ 26-032 Union Collective EE 60_ DD Set 3.pdf ​ ​ 100380_Union Collectivev_MP 60 DD SET 3.pdf ​ ​ Union Collective - Plumbing Drawngs - 6.23.26 1.pdf ​ Aaron, I wanted to follow up regarding the Union Collective project in Union, Kentucky. I called and left you a voicemail today and wanted to follow up via email as well to see if your team would be interested in providing a budgetary proposal for the project. We are currently seeking budgetary pricing based on the most current drawings available and are hoping to receive proposals by this Friday, if possible. The design is still being finalized, and we understand that additional revisions and updates will be issued as the project progresses. Any pricing submitted at this stage can be adjusted accordingly as new drawings and design updates are released. I have attached the most current Architectural, Civil, Structural, Mechanical, and Electrical drawings available for your review. These drawings represent the current design and should provide a good basis for budgetary pricing. If your team is interested in bidding the project, please let me know and I would be happy to provide any additional information you may need. I have also sent your company an invitation to the project through BuildingConnected. Thank you for your time and consideration and we look forward to hearing from you. Best Regards, Patrick Antone  Project Engineer Mobile:  219.406.4539 | Email:   pantone@alleatogroup.com   Web:   www.alleatogroup.com   |    Indianapolis:   8383 Craig Street, Suite 150 Indianapolis, IN 46250 Tampa/St. Pete:   701 94th Avenue North, Suite 118, St. Petersburg, FL 33702 Your partner from the ground up.
